## Summary

Describe the user-visible or protocol behavior changed by this pull request.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No consensus, network, peer API, database, or wallet format change.
- [ ] Compatibility impact and migration or reset instructions are documented.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] New or changed behavior has focused test coverage.
- [ ] No private keys, passwords, tokens, wallet files, or state databases are included.
